title: alsophila hyacinthei
intro: Alsophila hyacinthei, also known as the Kiokio or Kio Kio, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. It is used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alsophila hyacinthei include treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as soothing respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its rhizome can be dried and used in traditional Maori remedies.
